hooks.command: PLUGIN_ROOT="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}"; if [ -z "$PLUGIN_ROOT" ] || [ ! -f "$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/agent-org-session-start.sh" ]; then exit 0; fi; sh "$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/agent-org-session-start.sh"
PLUGIN_ROOT="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}"; if [ -z "$PLUGIN_ROOT" ] || [ ! -f "$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/build-slot-guard.py" ]; then exit 0; fi; python3 "$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/build-slot-guard.py"
